title: Perform code maintenance tasks using GitHub Copilot Agent
summary: Learn how to accelerate common code maintenance tasks using GitHub Copilot Agent. This training covers how to resolve issues quickly and accurately by using GitHub Copilot Agent to refactor code in a Visual Studio Code environment.

sections.title: Perform code maintenance tasks using GitHub Copilot Agent
sections.summary: Learn how to accelerate common code maintenance tasks using GitHub Copilot Agent. This training covers how to resolve issues quickly and accurately by using GitHub Copilot Agent to refactor code in a Visual Studio Code environment.

lessons.title: Consolidate duplicate logic using GitHub Copilot Agent
lessons.content_md:
This module teaches you how to identify and consolidate duplicate logic in your codebase using GitHub Copilot Agent. You learn best practices for refactoring duplicate code and improving code quality.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/consolidate-duplicate-logic-github-copilot-agent/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Consolidate duplicate logic using GitHub Copilot Agent

lessons.title: Refactor large functions using GitHub Copilot Agent
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to identify large multi-purpose functions and how to refactor large functions into smaller helper classes and static methods by using GitHub Copilot in Visual Studio Code.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/refactor-large-functions-github-copilot/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Refactor large functions using GitHub Copilot Agent

lessons.title: Simplify complex conditionals using GitHub Copilot Agent
lessons.content_md:
This module covers the use of GitHub Copilot's Agent mode to simplify complex conditional statements in code. It provides practical examples and exercises to enhance coding efficiency.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/simplify-complex-conditionals-github-copilot-agent/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Simplify complex conditionals using GitHub Copilot Agent

lessons.title: Implement code improvements using GitHub Copilot tools
lessons.content_md:
This module explores using GitHub Copilot Chat to develop improvements for an existing codebase. Exercises provide practical experience implementing GitHub Copilot suggestions that improve code quality, reliability, performance, and security.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-code-improvements-using-github-copilot-tools/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement code improvements using GitHub Copilot tools

lessons.title: Resolve GitHub issues using GitHub Copilot Agent
lessons.content_md:
This module covers how to identify and remediate GitHub issues using GitHub Copilot's Ask and Agent modes. The training focuses on security vulnerabilities such as SQL injection, encryption, logging, and path traversal problems.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/resolve-github-issues-github-copilot-agent/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Resolve GitHub issues using GitHub Copilot Agent

lessons.title: Resolve GitHub Secret Scanning alerts using GitHub Copilot Agent
lessons.content_md:
This module covers how to identify and remediate GitHub Secret Scanning alerts using GitHub Copilot's Ask and Agent modes. The training focuses on detecting hard-coded secrets in source code and implementing secure configuration patterns to replace them.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/resolve-github-secret-scanning-alerts-github-copilot-agent/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Resolve GitHub Secret Scanning alerts using GitHub Copilot Agent

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Perform code maintenance tasks using GitHub Copilot Agent
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Perform code maintenance tasks using GitHub Copilot Agent**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
